summary: REQ-1 is only partially implemented (index.html references new icons, but the required generated icon image files are not present in the diff). REQ-2 appears to move Arrival date into the card header top-right, but the diff is truncated so removal from the demographics grid cannot be fully verified. REQ-3 adds an age calculation utility and computes age in CaseCard, but the diff does not show the Age field actually being rendered in the demographics section (truncation). Also, project_state.json was modified to add new_feature_requests entries that were not part of the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add new cartoon-style app icon assets under frontend/public/assets/generated with exact filenames app-icon-dog-cat.dim_512x512.png, app-icon-dog-cat.dim_192x192.png, app-icon-dog-cat.dim_32x32.png.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files, so the required PNG assets are not evidenced as existing under frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the Arrival date no longer appears in the demographics grid section of CaseCard.tsx (only in the top-right header) and remains MM/DD/YYYY formatted.
missing_requirements.reason: CaseCard.tsx is truncated; while it shows Arrival date in a right-aligned header area, the diff does not conclusively show removal from the demographics grid section.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display an "Age" field in the demographics section of the patient card, derived from DOB, shown as years and months (e.g., "2y 3m"), suppressed/blank if DOB missing/invalid, and never negative.
missing_requirements.reason: calculateAge() is added and CaseCard computes `age`, but the truncated CaseCard diff does not show an "Age" row/value being rendered in the demographics section.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/updated project_state.json to include new_feature_requests entries (AR-1 through AR-6) marked pending.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not ask to modify project_state.json or add internal tracking entries; this appears unrelated to the requested frontend icon and CaseCard UI changes.
